name: wl_u2_upd_evicted
drl: rule W when accumulate( E0(tag == "z", $v : v) over window:length(2); $s : sum($v) ) then end
_finding: wl-ladder rung 3 (D-183) — THE FIND: [3, 5, 55] 3x — an external update of a LENGTH-EVICTED event REVIVES it into the fold: {50,2,3}=55, THREE events folding in an N=2 window. The time-window twin (pr_wl_time_revival, GREEN engine==oracle) revives too (52) — both window kinds revive in the pure-eviction shape; the D-137c2 clock_removed suppression covers a different composition (its pins stay green).
